generated_parts.label: Antenna Deployer x 2
generated_parts.spec: Tape-spring UHF/S-band antenna deployer, stowed flat, burn-wire release, latching tab

requirements.description: Subsystem module: Antenna Deployer x 2 (fixed BOM item inside 3U CubeSat)
requirements.spec: Tape-spring UHF/S-band antenna deployer, stowed flat, burn-wire release, latching tab
engineering_micro_pack: discipline: comms - role: Antenna deployer (tape-spring dummy ok), radio board slot, RF connector path
required evidence_features: antenna_slot, antenna_deployer, tape_spring, deploy_hinge, radio_board, rf_connector
[replaceable_module_path] good: Battery, sensor, actuator, cartridge, payload, cable, or joint modules remain removable without full teardown.
[cable_harness_visibility] good: Harnesses, tubes, or service channels are routed through visible raceways or protected channels.
[access_not_just_text] good: Access is represented by geometry: hatch, pocket, channel, fastener pattern, slot, window, or removable cover.

[harness_strain_relief_and_bend_radius] good: Every cable exit shows strain relief geometry (clamp, grommet, tie point) and routing respects a stated minimum bend radius away from moving joints and sharp edges.
[connector_accessibility_and_keying] good: Connectors are reachable without disassembling structure, have finger/tool clearance, and mention keying or labeling to prevent mis-mating.
[power_signal_separation] good: Motor power lines and sensor/encoder signal lines run in separate channels or are spaced/crossed at right angles, with the separation visible in routing geometry.
[return_path_and_grounding_intent] good: Each electronics module states its grounding scheme (star point, chassis bond, isolated) and signal returns route alongside their signals.
[board_mounting_and_clearance] good: PCBs mount on standoffs with keep-out clearance to walls and moving parts, connector edges face access openings, and mounting holes match standard board patterns.
